info.title: Generates a JavaScript client for a Facility Service Definition.

options.name: --module
options.description: The module name used by the generated JavaScript.

options.name: --fastify
options.description: Generates a Fastify plugin. When specified, only the server plugin is generated, not the client. EXPERIMENTAL: This option is subject to change/removal without a major version bump.

options.name: --file-name-suffix
options.description: Suffix to append to generated file names before the file extension.

options.name: --indent
options.description: The indent used in the output: a tab or a number of spaces.

options.name: --newline
options.description: The newline used in the output.

options.name: --exclude-tag
options.description: Excludes service elements with the specified tag.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Executes the tool without making changes to the file system.

options.name: --verify
options.description: Exits with error code 1 if changes to the file system are needed.
